title.zh: 14 远程服务健康检查与修复建议
title.en: 14 Remote Service Health Check and Fix Proposal

observation.en: HTTP 503 began at 10:12 and recovered at 10:20

observation.zh: DB_POOL_SIZE 从 12 改为 4，与等待时间升高吻合
observation.en: DB_POOL_SIZE changed from 12 to 4 and matches increased wait time

observation.zh: CPU 和内存没有同步升高
observation.en: CPU and memory did not rise at the same time

observation.zh: 先恢复配置，再复测 healthz 和等待时间
observation.en: Restore config first, then retest healthz and wait time

zh: 人工确认 repair-plan.md 包含影响范围、回退方式和复测窗口。
en: Manually confirm repair-plan.md includes impact scope, rollback, and retest window.

zh: 只读检查不能擅自重启、扩容或改配置。
修复建议要写清风险和回退路径。
如果要执行生产动作，先让负责人确认。
en: Read-only checks must not restart, scale, or change configuration without approval.
Fix suggestions must state risk and rollback path.
Production actions require owner confirmation first.

trigger.zh: 远程服务短时间内多次 5xx，需要只读确认健康状态并提出最小修复建议。
trigger.en: A remote service produced repeated 5xx responses, requiring read-only health confirmation and minimal fix suggestions.

firstSignal.zh: 10:12 到 10:19 错误率升高，重启不是第一步。
firstSignal.en: Error rate rose from 10:12 to 10:19, and restart was not the first step.

doneSignal.zh: 只读确认超时集中在一个下游调用，给出限流和回滚两条建议。
doneSignal.en: Read-only checks showed timeouts concentrated in one downstream call, producing rate-limit and rollback options.
